chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَمَتَّعُ بِالْمَرْأَةِ مِرَاراً كَثِيرَةً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 103 – The man does Mut’a with the woman many times

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/247)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/247)
text: الرَّجُلِ يَتَمَتَّعُ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ الْمَرَّاتِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ يَتَمَتَّعُ مِنْهَا مَا شَاءَ .

en.hubeali: Muahmmad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the man who marries the woman by Mut’a many times. Heasws said: ‘There is no problem if he does Mut’a with her for whatever (number of times) he so desires to’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “About the case of a man who marries a woman in the manner of al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage) many times, abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not unlawful, he can marry her in the manner of al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage) as many times as he wants.’”
